# BDE Score

> Open-source multi-factor stock analysis covering 74 stocks across US, HK, and China A-share markets.

## Quick Start
```bash
curl https://bathroom-ebooks-isa-accommodation.trycloudflare.com/api/analyze?market=ALL
```

## MCP Server (for AI Agents)
Connect BDE Score as an MCP tool for Claude, Cursor, Windsurf, or any MCP-compatible agent:

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "bde-score": {
      "url": "https://tex-adequate-date-facing.trycloudflare.com/mcp",
      "headers": {
        "X-API-Key": "YOUR_API_KEY"
      }
    }
  }
}
```

### MCP Auto-Discovery
- `.well-known/mcp.json`: https://hbhqq9.github.io/bde-score/.well-known/mcp.json
- `.well-known/agent.json`: https://hbhqq9.github.io/bde-score/.well-known/agent.json
- Glama registry: https://hbhqq9.github.io/bde-score/.well-known/glama.json

## x402 Micropayment
Pay per query with USDC on Base chain. No subscription required.
- Price: $0.01 USDC per query
- Payment endpoint: https://bathroom-ebooks-isa-accommodation.trycloudflare.com/pay/info
- 1 USDC = 1 year full access

## API Endpoints
- `GET /api/snapshot/{market}` — Full market snapshot (market: US, HK, A)
- `GET /api/stock/{symbol}` — Single stock analysis
- `GET /api/analyze?market=ALL` — Analyze all markets
- `GET /share/{symbols}` — SVG score cards
- `GET /widget` — Embeddable score widget
- `GET /dashboard` — Full data dashboard

- [GitHub](https://github.com/hbhqq9/bde-score)

- [Installation Guide](https://hbhqq9.github.io/bde-score/llms-install.html)
- [Full Documentation](https://hbhqq9.github.io/bde-score/llms-full.txt)
- [Dev.to](https://dev.to/hbhqq9/bde-score-open-source-multi-factor-stock-analysis-tool-covering-us-hk-a-share-markets-2p2j)

## Authentication
All endpoints require an API Key via `X-API-Key` header.
- Free tier: 3 queries/day, 10 requests/minute
- x402 micropayment: $0.01/query USDC on Base
